suite.name: Register E2E

test.name: Login Standard Test User

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.
kw.msg: Applicable driver not found; attempting to install with Selenium Manager (Beta)

Unable to obtain driver using Selenium Manager: Selenium Manager failed for: /Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/site-packages/selenium/webdriver/common/macos/selenium-manager --browser chrome --output json. The chromedriver version cannot be discovered
Cannot capture screenshot because no browser is open.

SeleniumManagerException: Message: Selenium Manager failed for: /Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/site-packages/selenium/webdriver/common/macos/selenium-manager --browser chrome --output json. The chromedriver version cannot be discovered

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.
